description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named s3fs-fuse CI that runs on every push, pull request, and on a weekly schedule. The workflow has multiple jobs: Linux, macos12, MemoryTest, and clang-tidy. The Linux job runs on various Linux containers, checks out the code, installs packages, builds, and runs tests. The macos12 job runs on macOS 12, checks out the code, installs fuse-t, and runs tests. The MemoryTest job runs on ubuntu-latest with a fedora:40 container, checks out the code, installs packages, and runs memory-related tests. The clang-tidy job runs on ubuntu-latest with a fedora:40 container, checks out the code, builds, and runs clang-tidy.
